data.title: Balaji urges creation of more 'crypto tools' for refugees during Middle East turmoil, stresses need for financial aids.
data.description: A former high-ranking official of a major cryptocurrency platform, Coinbase, has suggested that the crypto industry should focus on developing additional financial resources for refugees and individuals without a national identity. This recommendation comes at a time when global conflicts and forced migration are on the rise, impacting millions of people globally. By creating more accessible and secure financial tools, the industry can potentially assist this vulnerable population in managing their assets and navigating economic challenges.

data.title: Moonshot International Integrates Jupiter Perpetuals to Power Mobile Leverage Trading for 2M+ Users
data.description: Moonshot International has recently launched a new leverage trading offering that allows users to access up to 250 times leverage on popular cryptocurrencies including Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), and Solana (SOL). This product is supported by funding options through Apple Pay, Venmo, and debit cards. Developed on the Jupiter Perps platform, Moonshot International aims to provide a seamless and efficient trading experience for its users. The company, based in George Town, Cayman Islands, made this announcement on March 14, 2026.

data.title: Defense IPO Leads Five Stocks To Watch As Iran War Pressures Market
data.description: Five key stocks, including Karman Holdings and General Dynamics, are under the spotlight as market activity intensifies due to the Iran war. The surge in defense IPOs is attracting attention, with significant emphasis on these companies. This move is closely being monitored by investors as they navigate the volatile market landscape.

data.title: KAYALI Introduces Two New Juicy Additions to its Eden Fragrance Collection: Eden Sweet Peach | 35 Eau de Parfum & Eden Plush Pear | 23 Eau de Parfum
data.description: KAYALI has launched two new additions to its Eden collection, Eden Sweet Peach | 35 Eau de Parfum, epitomizing nostalgia, happiness, and fun. Released in New York on March 14, 2026, these playful, fruity floral fragrances aim to evoke joy and inspiration. The fragrances are designed to spark a sense of happiness and are a unique addition to the line. Explore these new scents to capture the essence of joy and uplift your spirits.

data.title: Blockchain tech fights money laundering effectively, with transparency tracking illegal transactions. Information sharing and unified AML rules enhance effectiveness while preserving financial freedom.
data.description: The transparency of blockchain technology allows for more effective tracking of illicit flows compared to traditional fiat systems. Through widespread information sharing and standardized anti-money laundering (AML) regulations, industries are able to prevent gaps in the system without compromising individual freedoms.
Boca Raton's population grew by 5% in 2021 to over 100,000 residents.

data.title: Will S&P 500 Open Up Or Down On March 12? Here Is How Polymarket Traders Lean As Oil Rebounds, Private Credit Concerns Mount
data.description: On Wednesday, the S&P 500 closed down by 0.084% at 6,775.80, with a historic release of strategic oil reserves failing to lower rising crude prices. The Polymarket crowd, on the other hand, is notably bearish for Thursday's market, with a mere 12% of traders betting on an "Up" opening for the March 12 market. Early trading volume for this bet is at $26,319. Energy markets are crucial, with WTI crude spiking by 8.45% to $94.62 following reports of Iran attacking three cargo vessels in the Strait of Hormuz, despite the IEA authorizing a record 400-million-barrel release of emergency reserves. In the financial sector, private credit markets are in turmoil. JPMorgan Chase & Co. is impacted. For more details, the full story is on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Trump's Iran Comments Spark Stock Market Reversal As Oil Prices Tumble
data.description: On Monday, the Dow Jones Futures witnessed a significant turnaround in response to President Trump's remarks regarding Iran. This led to a reversal in the stock market, with oil prices experiencing a notable decrease. This event underscores the impact of geopolitical statements on financial markets.

data.title: YY Group (NASDAQ: YYGH) Projects FY2026 Revenue Exceeding US$103 Million, Issues First Formal Guidance
data.description: YY Group, listed on NASDAQ as YYGH, has released its initial revenue forecast for the fiscal year 2026. The company anticipates a revenue range of $103 million to $110 million. This projection is primarily attributed to acquisitions made by the group, rising global staffing needs, and the expansion of its IFM sector.

data.title: TURBO ENERGY ANNOUNCES $3.25 MILLION REGISTERED DIRECT OFFERING WITH A SINGLE GLOBAL INSTITUTIONAL INVESTOR
data.description: Valencia, Spain - March 12, 2026 - Turbo Energy, S.A. (Nasdaq: TURB), a leading global provider of AI-optimized solar energy storage technologies, has recently disclosed the signing of a securities purchase agreement. The agreement, made with a single global institutional investor, involves the purchase and sale of 1,000,000 American Depositary Shares (ADSs) at the price of $3.25 per ADS in a registered direct offering. The deal is expected to result in gross proceeds of around $3.25 million, with final figures subject to deduction for placement agent commissions and other offering expenses. The closing of this transaction is anticipated to take place on or near March 13, 2026, pending the fulfillment of standard closing conditions.

data.title: Share Buyback Transaction Details March 5 – March 11, 2026
data.description: Today, Wolters Kluwer announced the repurchase of 101,978 of its own ordinary shares. This buyback took place between March 5, 2026, to March 11, 2026.

data.title: California’s ultra-rich are fighting a proposed 5% asset tax with millions in contributions.
data.description: Affluent individuals in the region have collectively contributed millions of dollars to oppose a potential 5% tax on their wealth.

data.title: U.S. Economy Has Lost Jobs Under Trump Tariffs, 'Gold Standard' Jobs Data Shows
data.description: Recent 'gold standard' employment data indicates the necessity for another revision by the Bureau of Labor Statistics. The data reveals that the U.S. economy has experienced a decline in jobs due to the tariffs imposed under the Trump administration. This information was brought to light by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: AAVE price aims for $131-137 rebound by March '26, currently trades at $110.22 with 4.6% drop and 20% potential increase projected.
data.description: The cryptocurrency AAVE is currently trading at $110.22, experiencing a 4.6% decrease. Analysts are optimistic about its future, foreseeing a potential 20% increase to a range between $131 and $137 in the coming days. Technical indicators suggest a possible reversal from oversold levels, indicating a positive outlook for AAVE.

data.title: LDO price may bounce to $0.32 from $0.29 due to oversold RSI, but could drop to $0.28 as per MACD.
data.description: The stock of LDO is currently trading at $0.29 per share. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicates that the stock is oversold, implying a potential short-term increase to $0.32. Nonetheless, the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) shows bearish signals, pointing towards a probable test of the $0.28 support level within the next few weeks.

data.title: Price prediction: HBAR at $0.09 eyes $0.10 resistance. Mixed signals: RSI neutral at 41.37, bearish MACD. Be cautious.
data.description: The cryptocurrency HBAR is currently trading at $0.09 and is encountering significant resistance at the $0.10 mark. Technical analysis indicates conflicting signals as the Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands neutral at 41.37, while the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) shows bearish momentum, indicating a need for caution among investors.

data.title: Dogwifhat (WIF) price at $0.17 drops 4.62% in 24 hours. Predicted recovery to $0.21 if $0.16 support holds.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Dogwifhat (WIF) is currently priced at $0.17, having decreased by 4.62% over the past day. Expert analysis indicates a possible upturn towards the resistance level of $0.21 if the current support level at $0.16 remains stable.

data.title: By April 2026, PEPE price may hit $0.0000070. Oversold RSI at 39.15 signals potential reversal to $0.0000070-$0.0000072 range.
data.description: The crypto asset PEPE is currently experiencing oversold conditions, with its Relative Strength Index (RSI) measured at 39.15. Analysts are eyeing a potential recovery range of $0.0000070 to $0.0000072. There is a possibility of the current bearish trend shifting as it approaches key support levels.

data.title: USDC market cap close to $80B amid UAE 'capital flight': Analyst suggests link to Dubai real estate turmoil.
data.description: The market capitalization of USDC is close to hitting a record high of $80 billion. One analyst believes this surge is due to capital flight and instability in Dubai's real estate sector.

data.title: ALGO price may reach $0.10-$0.16 by April '26. Analysts eye $0.095-$0.16 range with current price at $0.09. More details inside.
data.description: Algorand is displaying signs of potential recovery after being oversold, with analysts eyeing a price range of $0.095 to $0.16. Technical indicators indicate a neutral momentum for ALGO as it is currently trading at $0.09.
